subject: Older humanoid figure with large dome-like head hunched over a glowing orb
description: An older-presenting humanoid figure with an oversized, smooth dome-like head leans or hunches forward, hands extended toward a large glowing purple-pink energy orb or sphere that dominates the lower portion of the frame. The figure wears a pale yellowish outfit. The background glows with dark cosmic tones — deep purple and black gradients suggesting space or a dimension between worlds. The overall scene reads as a scientist or villain in the act of channeling or controlling some dangerous power.
foreground: Dome-headed humanoid in pale outfit, hands extended over glowing orb
background: Deep purple-black cosmic void with energy glow
